basics.name: Ishani Kapoor
basics.title: Full-stack Developer | BIT'24 | KIIT'26
basics.summary: I am an ambitious and hardworking individual, with broad skills in programming, database and designing websites, seeking to leverage programming skills in a challenging IT role. My strength is communication, building relationships in order to deliver my best . I am focused on utilizing my skills to contribute to meaningful projects ,learn from experienced professionals, and grow in the field of Software Engineering

bullets: Full-stack development using modern web technologies.

education.institution: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology, Bhubaneswar

projects.title: Mentora
bullets: Designed and implemented a personalized onboarding workflow that collects user career preferences, skills, and goals to generate customized industry insights and recommendations.
Built an AI-powered Resume Builder using Gemini-2, enabling users to automatically generate professional, ATS-friendly resumes tailored to their skills and experience.
Developed an AI-generated Cover Letter Generator that creates personalized cover letters based on job roles and user profiles.
Engineered a Mock Test and Quiz System that dynamically generates assessments using AI based on the user’s selected skills and career interests.
Implemented secure authentication and user management using Clerk, providing protected dashboards and personalized user experiences.
Designed the system architecture and database schema using PostgreSQL and Prisma ORM to efficiently manage user profiles, generated content, and assessment data.
Integrated Inngest workflows to periodically fetch and update industry insights and career data, ensuring users receive updated guidance.
Built a responsive and modern UI using Next.js App Router and TailwindCSS, optimizing performance and scalability.
Deployed the full-stack application on Vercel with server-side actions for efficient backend processing.
Provides an end-to-end AI career assistance platform that helps users plan careers, prepare job documents, and evaluate skills in one unified system.
Demonstrates expertise in AI integration, full-stack development, authentication systems, and scalable web architecture

projects.title: QueryGrid AI Tool
bullets: Developed a modern, full-stack web application with a real-time chat interface and deploying the entire application on Vercel.
Frontend: Responsive UI using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
Backend: Authentication and API routes in Next.js.
Database: Scalable data storage with MongoDB.
Features: Search functionality, user authentication, optimized performance.
